notes: Prices scraped from studio websites. 'verified: true' means prices were found on the website. 'verified: false' means prices could not be confirmed online.

ooom-lausanne.notes: Single CHF 35. 5-class card CHF 150. 12-class card CHF 335. 6 classes/month CHF 140. Unlimited 1 month CHF 165 (incl. online library). 4 months unlimited CHF 580. 3 intro classes CHF 59. 2-week discovery CHF 75. 10% discount for students/unemployed/seniors (excl. unlimited).

nueva-luna-yoga.notes: Single CHF 30. Trial CHF 20. 10-class pass CHF 270. Monthly unlimited CHF 180. Annual CHF 1500. Children trial free, single CHF 20.

the-yogarden.notes: Wix-based website, pricing not extractable from static HTML.

yogaworks-lausanne.trial_note: First class CHF 30, second class free
yogaworks-lausanne.notes: Drop-in CHF 30. 10-class card CHF 260. Monthly unlimited CHF 160. Annual CHF 1300. 15% student/unemployed/AVS discount (excl. unlimited). Pre-paid series valid 2 years. Private 60min CHF 100, 90min CHF 120.

yoga-flame-lausanne.notes: Pricing loaded via Bsport dynamic widget, not accessible from static HTML scraping. Same brand as Yoga Flame Geneve.

yogavaud.notes: Domain appears to be parked/for sale. Studio may have moved to a different website.

myoga-studio-lausanne.trial_note: First 2 classes for CHF 30 total (CHF 15 each)
myoga-studio-lausanne.notes: Single CHF 25. 5-class card CHF 120. 10-class card CHF 230. First 2 classes CHF 30. Subscriptions are personal, non-reimbursable, and do not expire. Pricing page may be from 2017.

ashtanga-yoga-lausanne.notes: Wix-based website, pricing not extractable from static HTML. Schedule page returned 404.

imyoga-lausanne.notes: Pricing loaded dynamically, not extractable. Schedule/rates pages did not contain pricing in static HTML.

yoga-sadhana-lausanne.notes: Pricing pages returned 404. Pricing mentioned but not displayed on main page.

yoga-moves-nyon.notes: Single CHF 38 (reduced under 25 / over 65: CHF 35). 10-class card CHF 350 valid 6 months (reduced CHF 300). Monthly unlimited CHF 250 (reduced CHF 190, new members CHF 149). 14-day trial CHF 89.

yogacenter-montreux.notes: Single in-person CHF 35. Trial CHF 20. 12-class pack CHF 350 (4 months). 24-class pack CHF 595 (8 months). 36-class pack CHF 720 (12 months). Online single CHF 15. Private CHF 120/h.

casa-vinyasa-vevey.notes: Website returned SSL error (526). Momoyoga booking page showed schedule but no pricing.

terre-du-yoga-vevey.notes: Domain redirects to caroledalmas.com (301). Studio may have rebranded or closed.

sundora-shala-pully.notes: Wix-based website, pricing not extractable from static HTML.

yoga-pour-tous-nyon.notes: Group class CHF 30/hour. Private session at home CHF 120/60min. Monthly themed workshop CHF 70/3h. No 10-class card or monthly subscription listed.
